name: Grilled Beef Tenderloin with Western BBQ Sauce (Gr)
recipeIngredient: 1 whole beef tenderloin, unpeeled (5 to 6 pounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim off excess fat.
2. Cover the tenderloin heavily with salt and pepper.
3. Brush the tenderloin with Western BBQ Sauce.
4. Over high heat, sear the tenderloin on both sides for about 10 to 15 minutes.
5. Remove the meat from the grill and push the coals over to one side.
6. Replace the meat over the side with no coals.
7. Cover and vent the grill.
8. Continue to cook for 30 minutes while basting with BBQ Sauce for medium rare.
Western BBQ Sauce:
Mix all ingredients together and use to baste beef tenderloin.
